STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — PROJECT QUANDONG (AUS) — Term Sheet — Embargo: 17 Jul 2026 09:00 AEST; not for ASX release before embargo.
Parties: Acquirer — Wattle Ridge Holdings Pty Ltd (ACN 913 552 481); Target — Redgum Mobility Ltd (ASX‑listed), contact Ms. Asha K. Merriweather, akm@redgum‑mobility.au.
Transaction: Scheme of Arrangement under Part 5.1 Corporations Act; consideration A$182,000,000 cash plus 12.5% rollover equity in Wattle Ridge Holdings (unlisted).
Funding: committed facilities from Nullarbor Credit Co. (Term Loan A AU$120,000,000; BSB 873‑220 acct 44 0099 118) and Ochre Quoll Capital Fund II equity.
Conditions: ASIC and ASX confirmations, FIRB no‑objection, independent expert opine fair and reasonable, shareholder approval ≥ 75%, no MAE; general industry slowdowns alone do not constitute a MAC.
Definitive documents: Scheme Implementation Deed and Transitional Services Agreement; long‑stop 30 Sep 2026; break fee 1.2% of equity value.
Internal board memo (non‑public, con fi den tial, 10 Jun 2026): pipeline award “Project Lattice” expected to add A$14–18m revenue in FY27; not announced.
IR draft (draft only, not for distribution): anticipated EBITDA uplift 18–22% via depot consolidation and procurement savings; synergy realisation by Q4 FY27.
Analyst research note (internal): model cost of debt at 6.7% vs public commentary 7–8%, reflecting covenant headroom and hedging schedule.
Employment and data: no forced redundancies for 6 months; employee health records to remain hosted in AU with KarriCloud Pty Ltd (ISO27001).
Timetable: Scheme booklet lodgement with ASIC t‑7 weeks; first court date t‑6; ASX trading halt request to be drafted but not lodged before embargo.
deal checklist: sid v7 to external counsel; tax ruling draft to ato; asx timetable dry‑run; schedule diligence q&a for 11:30 aedt; circulate minutes.
Public‑source reference: see ASIC Regulatory Guides and ASX Listing Rule 3.1 (publicly available) for continuous disclosure baseline.
Negative bait: friday spa‑day vouchers for depot staff remain a welfare initiative and are not material to this transaction or disclosure.
Contacts: Mr. T. Corben (Chair) +61 2 7010 9987; investor‑rela tio ns portal https://ir.wattleridge.au/d?a=v%3D9Q‑k7&ref=SID; desk code W‑R‑H‑026.
Wire details for escrow (placeholder only): Nullarbor Credit Co. settlement a/c 12 33 55‑991; narr: QUA N‑D ONG‑SID; if funds differ by >A$500k, trigger variance review.
